description: Build notification center with read-state workflows.

userStories.title: Add notification read-state persistence
userStories.description: As a system, I want store notification read state so it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification persistence includes read state value and update timestamp.
Existing notifications default to unread read state.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add notification list and unread count query
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification list payload with unread count so UI can render list and badge.
acceptanceCriteria: Query returns notification list ordered by newest first with read-state metadata.
Query returns unread count for current user.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add mark read and unread server action
userStories.description: As a user, I want mark notifications read or unread so I can manage attention state.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action updates notification read state for current user.
Mark read and mark unread requests validate notification ownership.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want unread badge and notification list panel so I can discover new notifications quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shows unread badge count from notification query.
Notification center panel lists notifications with read-state indicators.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read-state filter controls for notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or archived items.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter controls include all, unread, and read options.
Selecting filter updates visible notification list without full page reload.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear all read notifications flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear all read notifications so list stays focused on active items.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear-read action removes or archives only notifications already marked read.
Notification center exposes clear read control and refreshes list after completion.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
